## Overview

Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world's largest cloud computing provider with approximately 28% global market share (Q4 2025). Founded in 2006 as a subsidiary of Amazon.com, AWS offers over 200 managed services spanning compute, storage, database, AI/ML, networking, security, and analytics. The eu-west-2 (London) region provides UK data residency for workloads requiring data to remain on UK soil. AWS Bedrock provides managed access to foundation models including Anthropic Claude, with regional endpoints that guarantee data stays within specific geographic regions.

## Products & Services

Relevant to DeLimerence:

- **Amazon Bedrock**: Managed access to foundation models (Claude, Llama, Titan) with regional endpoints for data residency. On-demand and provisioned throughput pricing.
- **ECS Fargate**: Serverless container orchestration -- run containers without managing servers. Auto-scaling based on CPU/memory.
- **RDS PostgreSQL**: Managed PostgreSQL with Multi-AZ deployment, automated backups, point-in-time recovery, and encryption.
- **Secrets Manager**: Managed secrets store with automatic rotation. $0.40/secret/month + $0.05/10K API calls.
- **CloudWatch**: Monitoring, logging, and alerting. Structured log ingestion, metric dashboards, and alarms.
- **WAF**: Web Application Firewall for HTTP/HTTPS traffic filtering.
- **S3**: Object storage for static assets, backups, and data archival.
- **ALB**: Application Load Balancer for HTTP/HTTPS traffic distribution.

## Pricing Model

Usage-based pricing across all services. Key pricing models:

- **On-Demand**: Pay per hour/second of use (no commitment)
- **Savings Plans**: Up to 66% discount for 1-3 year committed use
- **Reserved Instances**: Up to 72% discount for 1-3 year reserved capacity
- **Free Tier**: 12-month free tier for new accounts (t2.micro EC2, 750h RDS, etc.)

Bedrock regional endpoints carry a 10% premium over global endpoints for guaranteed data residency.

## UK Government Presence

- G-Cloud listed: Yes (major G-Cloud supplier across all lots)
- DOS listed: Yes
- UK data centres: Yes -- eu-west-2 (London) with multiple availability zones

## Strengths

- UK data residency on UK soil (eu-west-2 London)
- Broadest managed service catalogue of any cloud provider
- AWS Bedrock provides Claude access in same UK region -- minimal latency
- Healthcare compliance tooling (AWS Artifact, HIPAA eligible services)
- ECS Fargate eliminates server management for container workloads
- Secrets Manager with automatic rotation satisfies NFR-SEC-004
- Compute Savings Plans provide up to 66% discount
- 99.99% SLA for Multi-AZ deployments
- Mature security model (IAM, VPC, encryption)
- G-Cloud listed -- pre-approved for UK government procurement
- Largest cloud community and ecosystem

## Weaknesses

- Most expensive of three major cloud providers for comparable workloads
- Complex, multi-dimensional pricing model (difficult to estimate costs accurately)
- Requires AWS-specific knowledge on the team
- Console UX is less intuitive than Azure or GCP for some services
- Support plans are expensive (Business support starts at $100/month or 10% of spend)

## Projects Referenced In

- DeLimerence (Project 001) -- Cloud Infrastructure provider (recommended)
